gate_override.reason: Awaiting user decision. 0 CRITICAL findings; every NEW WARN is documentation catch-up — plan.md / spec.md / product-spec / tasks.md not amended for the very large Sessions 23-25 shipped surface (4 clusters: §14 8 tasks + §15 10 tasks + §16 5 tasks + §17 4 tasks). Material gaps: (1) product-spec/data-model.md missing GdprAuditLog entity + User.admin_notes + User.flagged_for_review* + Report.acknowledged_at + Report.reason enum drift (self_harm→hate_speech rename + 5→9 values), (2) plan §6 missing 3 module rows (users + gdpr + reports; code has 16 modules vs plan/spec 15), (3) plan §13 Moderation Flow stale (no Discord webhook, no acknowledge_report CLI, no SUSPENDED middleware, no album merge admin path), (4) plan §14 GDPR Pipeline stale (path drift, Postmark→Resend, no dual-artifact, no R2_EXPORT_BUCKET, cascade list missing 6 collections, no audit-log threading), (5) plan §4.5 missing 7-8 rate-limit rows, (6) plan §15.2 missing 4 PostHog events from S23-25, (7) plan §17.1 missing 4 env vars (R2_AVATAR_BUCKET + R2_EXPORT_BUCKET + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL + API_BACKEND_URL), (8) plan §7.1 missing 8 new routes + §7.7 OG share-card flow subsection, (9) spec.md US-G1/G2/G4/G5/H2/H5 all under-document the shipped surface. Carry-forwards (L3-017, L4-009, L6-002) remain user-deferred under existing dispositions. Code is healthy: 964 backend pass / 3 skip across 203 source files; 78 frontend Vitest pass; Biome 155 files + tsc 0 errors + next build 26 routes (24 visible + 2 OG API); zero orphan files. POSITIVE: tasks.md structural-field convention HELD this run — no regression on the §13 / T030 / T094 pattern from Run #11. All 24 new tasks T145-T170 carry the six-field block (Paths/Size/Deps/Refs/Description/Done) inline with their *(completed ...)* prose annotation.

honest_assessment: Sessions 23-25 shipped an enormous surface (~150 backend tests + ~15 frontend tests + 9 new endpoints + 2 new arq workers + 4 new CLI scripts + 3 new Beanie Documents + 4 new env vars + 10 new frontend routes + 5 new components). The code is healthy across every quality gate. The drift is downstream and structural-documentary: the plan + spec + product-spec haven't kept pace with the very fast clip of the §14-§17 wave. The biggest plan-side gap is the absence of 3 new module rows from §6 (users + gdpr + reports). The biggest spec-side gap is the absence of admin_notes / flagged_for_review / acknowledged_at / 9-value reason enum from product-spec/data-model.md. The biggest cluster gap is plan §13 (moderation flow) + plan §14 (GDPR pipeline) — both are documentation-dispatcher equivalents that haven't been written for the shipped contract. POSITIVE finding: tasks.md structural-field convention HELD — no §13/T030/T094-style regression this run. All 24 new tasks carry the six-field block. Nothing here is a bug; it's all 'what we shipped vs what we promised in our docs' alignment.
